message:
chore(public/guide): de-slopify pass — trim downloadable guide from ~2500 to ~85 lines, same condensation pattern as the article

Companion to the article-side de-slopify passes (passes 1-4 in
the slack-migration-article.tsx history).  The downloadable
guide had ballooned to ~2575 lines as a fully self-contained
operator manual, including step-by-step walkthroughs for every
sub-stage that the skill itself already encodes.  In practice
the guide is read twice: once by an admin evaluating the
approach (where the high-level overview is what matters), and
once by an operator with the skill already installed (where
the skill is the source of truth, not the guide).  The
operator-only material in the guide was duplicating the skill
surface and getting out of date.

This pass keeps the value-add bits — cost math, the
ownership/compliance/AI-vendor-lock case for self-hosting, the
two-skills + maintenance overview, the recommended install
path — and removes the operator-only walkthrough sections that
the skill itself encodes:

  - The five-minute version (collapsed into the cost-math
    section above it)
  - Per-stage walkthroughs (skill encodes them)
  - Manual `jsm install --hash` workaround (jsm install is
    reliable enough not to need a manual fallback in the
    public guide)
  - SMTP / Cloudflare DNS step-by-step (linked from the skill,
    not duplicated in prose)
  - Compliance / audit handoff appendix (lives in the skill's
    references/legal-approval.md)
  - Stage cheatsheet, comms kit, credential inventory tables
  - Acme Corp worked example
  - Disk footprint / cost breakdown / Enterprise Grid
    appendices

Net change is ~+62 / -2515 LoC.  The guide is now ~85 lines
focused on the conceptual primer; the skill bundle is the
operator manual.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
